case_title: LOEVSKY, GEORGIY vs. MUERE, KYONG et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOEVSKY, GEORGIY AS TO DEFENDANT MUERE, KYONG DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-10-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-21-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-10-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUN-10-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUL-10-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
